products.name: Aviator Classic Gold
products.description: Timeless teardrop aviator silhouette with a polished gold frame and gradient smoke lenses. A versatile icon that suits oval, square, and heart-shaped faces alike.

products.name: Wayfarer Matte Black
products.description: Bold rectangular frame in a soft-touch matte finish. Polarized G15 green lenses cut glare without distorting natural color, perfect for driving and outdoor sport.

products.name: Cat-Eye Rose Crystal
products.description: An upswept cat-eye frame cast in translucent rose acetate with mirrora gradient lenses. Vintage glamour reinterpreted for the modern wardrobe.

products.name: Round John Tortoise
products.description: Perfectly circular lenses set in a hand-polished tortoise-shell acetate frame. Inspired by 1970s counter-culture, finished with anti-reflective coated lenses.

products.name: Sport Wrap Carbon
products.description: Featherweight carbon-fiber wrap frame engineered for high-speed stability. Hydro-grip nose pads and shatterproof polycarbonate lenses with 100% UV400 protection.

products.name: Oversized Square Pearl
products.description: Generous square silhouette in pearlescent ivory acetate. Provides ample coverage and a sophisticated statement for sunny city escapes.

products.name: Crystal Clear Round
products.description: Transparent crystal acetate round frame with a keyhole bridge. Lightweight and understated, ideal for everyday single-vision or progressive lenses.

products.name: Titanium Rectangle
products.description: Minimalist rectangle frame milled from surgical-grade titanium. Hypoallergenic, ultra-light, and engineered with adjustable spring-hinge temples for all-day comfort.

products.name: Burgundy Cat Reading
products.description: Soft cat-eye frame in deep burgundy acetate with delicate gold temple detailing. Pairs reading clarity with refined feminine elegance.

products.name: Navy Blue Square
products.description: Classic navy square frame in durable TR90 memory polymer. Flexible, heat-resistant, and impact-resistant, perfect for active lifestyles.

products.name: Pastel Mint Oval
products.description: Soft oval frame in pastel mint acetate with a satin finish. Complements warm skin tones and adds a fresh accent to everyday looks.

products.name: Gunmetal Browline
products.description: Semi-rimless browline silhouette in gunmetal metal with acetate brow insert. A retro-intellectual style rebalanced for the contemporary professional.

categories.name: Sunglasses
categories.description: UV-protective eyewear for every light condition.
